description: A customer wants to book a flight from New York to London, and then return from Paris back to New York.

nodes.task_description: Search for flights for the two legs of the journey: JFK to LHR and CDG to JFK.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds available flights for both legs.

nodes.task_description: Combine the two flights into a single open-jaw booking.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates one booking with the specified itinerary.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total price, process payment, and issue the ticket.

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the booking and ticketing process.
